scope.summary: Oracle purity metadata remains advisory-only: no metadata channel can auto-admit a routine the independent oracle cannot already prove read-only.
out_of_scope: No runtime query of DETERMINISTIC, ALL_PROCEDURES, or USER_PROCEDURES was added.
No doctor candidate-review UX for Oracle purity metadata was added in this close.

entry_points.name: tightening-only purity restriction
entry_points.trace: crates/oraclemcp-guard/src/purity.rs OperatorPureFunctionRestriction returns ProvenReadOnly only when the independent SideEffectOracle already returned ProvenReadOnly and the exact routine identity is operator-allowlisted; Unknown and ProvenSideEffecting pass through unchanged.

entry_points.name: B12d advisory invariant test
entry_points.trace: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target cargo test -p oraclemcp-guard --test purity_core_conformance no_allowlist_state -- --nocapture passed: 1 passed, 0 failed.

entry_points.name: default unknown oracle non-promotion test
entry_points.trace: CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/home/durakovic/projects/oraclemcp/target cargo test -p oraclemcp-guard --test purity_core_conformance operator_pure_function_allowlist_never_promotes_default_unknown_oracle -- --nocapture passed: 1 passed, 0 failed.

entry_points.name: metadata remains non-authoritative
entry_points.trace: rg over crates/oraclemcp-core/src, crates/oraclemcp/src, crates/oraclemcp-guard/src, and crates/oraclemcp-config/src found no DETERMINISTIC, ALL_PROCEDURES, or USER_PROCEDURES purity-admission channel; plan text records Oracle purity metadata is never consulted as proof.

limitations: Scoped guard tests only; no full-workspace clippy/test gate is claimed from this shared dirty checkout.
This closes the tighten-only safety invariant, not a new operator-review UI.
